reviews.comment:
Muy buen lugar para hacer una parada, por detrás de la estación tiene un lugar bastante grande muy arbolado y con parrillas.
En la estación hay confitería y muy buenos baños

(Translated by Google)
A great place to stop; behind the station there's a large, shady area with grills.
The station has a café and very good restrooms.

reviews.comment:
Los tostados que te sirven son los sándwiches de miga que vienen envasados y se lee el  vencieron. Un gusto agrio el jamón terrible!

(Translated by Google)
The toasted sandwiches they serve are the pre-packaged finger sandwiches with the expiration date printed on them. The ham has a terrible sour taste!

reviews.comment:
Fui ayer, pedí un combo de Hamburguesa qué estaba en la pantalla a $13.000
Me dijeron que el precio estaba mal y me querían cobrar $18.000 estando todavía el precio en pantalla
Me fui y seguía a $13.000

(Translated by Google)
I went yesterday and ordered a burger combo that was displayed on the screen for $13,000.
They told me the price was wrong and wanted to charge me $18,000 even though the price was still on the screen.
I left and it was still $13,000.

reviews.comment:
Mi viejo me pidió comprar 4 o 5 foquitos de una patente que se queman a cada rato. Y al llegar al Box me dijeron que valian $4.500 c/u. Luego de pu$ear a Miley compro 4  y al comentarle a mi viejo. Me comenta que es imposible! Decí que pedi el recibo así que fuimos a cualquier lubricentro de  la zona. Las mismas mismas lamparitas nos salian 500 pesos cada una.
Así que fuimos a devolver al ACA los 18 mil pesos en 4 foquitos.
Devolver el dinero lo devolvieron

(Translated by Google)
My dad asked me to buy four or five license plate bulbs that keep burning out. When I got to the auto parts store, they told me they were $4,500 each. After complaining to Miley, I bought four, and when I told my dad, he said it was impossible! Luckily, I asked for a receipt, so we went to any auto shop in the area. The same bulbs were only $500 each.
So we went to the auto parts store to return the $18,000 we'd spent on four bulbs. They refunded the money.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/3043323831765025756/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2t0WWNGRkVSV3M0TTJsUFdrMDVkVU5DVVY5RlZHYxAB
